data.title: Carter's longtime CEO announces departure
data.description: He served in other leadership roles at Carter's for 15 years before taking the CEO role, which he also held for 15 years.

data.title: Despite a weak first quarter, MSC keeps pushing digital commerce ahead
data.description: For the quarter ending Nov. 30, MSC Industrial posted sales net sales of $928.5 million, a decrease of 2.7% from the previous year of net sales of $954.0 million.

data.title: What December's Baird/Digital Commerce 360 Ecommerce Stock Index results showed
data.description: Despite December's results, the index ended 2024 up 27.1% for the full year, managing to outperform the S&P by more than three points.

data.title: Digital manufacturer Protolabs rolls out a new plan for better order management
data.description: “We’ve realigned our operations to deliver a more unified prototyping-to-production experience,” says CEO Rob Bodor.

data.title: SPS Commerce to acquire Carbon6 Technologies in $210 million deal
data.description: Carbon6, a Toronto-based company founded in 2021, provides software tools designed to support Amazon sellers in managing and growing their businesses.
